name: delphi-v0-llama2-12.8m
license_evidence: HF cardData.license=mit + tag license:mit + README frontmatter 'license: mit'. No standalone LICENSE file in repo (siblings: README.md only); HF metadata is the authoritative license field.
arch: LlamaForCausalLM hidden=384 layers=8 heads=16 vocab=4096 tied-embeddings
quant: int4 group-wise (g=64, per-group fp16 scale + int8 zero), tie-aware
runtime: karpathy llama2.c run.c (SentencePiece tok, 4096 vocab); dequant -> .bin export
notes: forward_ok=true, missing=0 unexpected=0, max dequant err ~0.022. Leaderboard est ~6.7MB; measured 6.97MB (bundle includes per-group scales/zeros + 64KB SentencePiece tokenizer + config).
